nodes.title: Extensive research into promising ideas for new charities
nodes.text: Find out more about our extensive research into promising charity ideas at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: Corroboration of several recommendations by GiveWell and OpenPhilanthropy. Strong track record of CE's incubated charities with no diminishing performance over time.
connections.assumptions: Researcher skills, time and available information are sufficient to make recommendations worth following. The pool of shovel-ready ideas is not exhausted.

nodes.title: Outreach to encourage talented individuals to apply to the program
nodes.text: Find out more about our outreach and application process at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: Historical data showing consistent ~20 suitable candidates from ~3000 applications annually.
connections.assumptions: Talent pool is not exhausted and outreach continues to attract quality applicants. Selection criteria accurately identify entrepreneurship potential.

nodes.title: Rigorous vetting to identify the most promising applicants
nodes.text: Find out more about our rigorous vetting process at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: Vetting scores show 0.7 correlation with internal estimates of charity impact, demonstrating predictive validity of the selection process.
connections.assumptions: Vetting process accurately identifies suitable applicants. Selected co-founders wouldn't have had greater impact elsewhere.

nodes.title: Improve and facilitate training program to launch an effective charity
nodes.text: Find out more about our training programs for charity founders at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: Successful scaling to two programs per year while maintaining quality standards. Consistent program delivery track record.
connections.assumptions: Running two Incubation Programs per year is sustainable at equal or higher quality. New program types can be integrated without compromising existing quality.

nodes.title: Outreach to intelligent, value-aligned funders to join seed network
nodes.text: Find out more about our funder outreach and seed network at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: 83% of applications funded in last 3 programs (94% for CE recommended charity ideas). Average funding of $120k demonstrates strong funder commitment.
connections.assumptions: Funding landscape can support ~10 new charities per year across cause areas, even in economic downturns. CE's reputation attracts sufficient high-quality funders.

nodes.title: Reports recommending excellent ideas for new charities to launch
nodes.text: Find out more about our charity recommendation reports at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: Historical correlation between quality research reports and successful business plan submissions. Report recommendations have been validated by external organizations.
connections.assumptions: Recommended ideas are diverse enough for founders with different preferences. Quality research translates to actionable charity ideas.

nodes.title: Cohorts of talented participants who are a good fit for entrepreneurship
nodes.text: Find out more about our entrepreneurship cohorts at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: 62% of participants founded after the last 3 programs, indicating strong conversion from cohort participation to plan development.
connections.assumptions: Facilitation leads to strong co-founder & idea combinations. Teaching equips participants with necessary knowledge and support for success.

nodes.title: Programs occur multiple times a year
nodes.text: Find out more about our year-round programs at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: 62% of participants founded after the last 3 programs. Consistent program delivery demonstrates scalability.
connections.assumptions: Teaching effectively equips participants with knowledge and support needed for smart launch plans and field success.

nodes.title: Seed network with the resources and good judgement to fund deserving proposals
nodes.text: Find out more about our seed funding network at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: 83% of applications funded in last 3 programs (94% for CE recommended charity ideas). Average funding of $120k demonstrates robust funding capacity.
connections.assumptions: Seed network has sufficient resources and maintains good judgment in funding decisions. Funded proposals translate to operational charities.

nodes.title: Incubatees form strong co-founder teams & submit high quality launch plans to the seed network for funding
nodes.text: Find out more about our co-founder matching and funding process at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: High follow-through rate from plan submission to charity launch. Seed network's selective funding approach ensures quality.
connections.assumptions: Seed network only funds teams with high expected counterfactual impact. Funded co-founder teams follow through on launching charities.

nodes.title: New effective charities exist, some of which wouldn't have otherwise
nodes.text: Find out more about the new effective charities we've launched at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: Track record of launched charities demonstrates successful transition from funding to operational programs. Portfolio performance shows sustainability.
connections.assumptions: Charities can secure funding through the 'valley of death' phase. Organizations and co-founders maintain their values and don't succumb to mission drift.

nodes.title: Charities execute counterfactually impactful programs
nodes.text: Find out more about our charities' impactful programs at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/

connections.evidence: ~40% of charities are field leading based on internal assessments, public M&E results, endorsements from GiveWell and OpenPhilanthropy, and 11 positive external evaluations (11/11 positive rate).
connections.assumptions: Impactful programs translate directly to improved wellbeing outcomes. Cost-effectiveness assessments accurately predict real-world impact.

nodes.title: Improved wellbeing for humans and animals
nodes.text: Find out more about improving wellbeing for humans and animals at https://www.charityentrepreneurship.com/
